payloadFactory.format:
Claim Update for Claim $1

$2

Dear User,

We would like to inform you that the review of your Personal Auto Insurance claim submitted on $3 has been completed.

For security and privacy reasons, detailed information regarding the outcome of your claim is available only through the Exasure Insurance Integration Cloud portal.

View Claim Details

Sincerely,
Exasure IIC

This is an automated message. Please do not reply.

{ "errorCode": "400", "errorMessage": "The claim with Claim ID $1 is currently in '$2' status. Only claims in 'APPLIED' status are eligible for rejection.", "errorDetails": "The claim with Claim ID $1 is currently in '$2' status. Only claims in 'APPLIED' status are eligible for rejection.", "transactionId": "$3", "timeStamp": "$4" }
